Localization.Description: A user logged in or attempted to log in to an application under a default account

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} attempted to log in to application {event_src.title} under a default account on host {event_src.host}
A user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to application {event_src.title} under a default account on host {event_src.host}
